summary: Completed frontend testing for color enhancement feature. All tests passed - landing page displays richer blue/green color accents throughout while maintaining simple, clean design.
passed_tests: Landing page loads without runtime errors
Logo and brand name (C&C Property Care) visible and functional
Header displays blue gradient background with colored border and shadow
Hero section shows blue/green radial gradient accents
CTA buttons display correct colors (blue #0ea5e9 for Call, green #22c55e for Book)
CTA buttons are side-by-side (flex row layout) and all clickable
Proof section has blue gradient background with 4 photo cards featuring colored borders
Services section displays blue/green gradient background
All 5 service dropdowns are closed by default
Service dropdowns open/close functionality works correctly
Each service item has unique colored border (blue/green variations)
About section shows green/blue gradient background
About card has green border, Why card has blue border
'Why choose us' section remains static (not a dropdown)
Final CTA section displays blue/green gradient with blue border and shadow
Footer shows dark blue/green gradient background
Text maintains good contrast and readability (dark text on light backgrounds)
Design remains simple without overpowering gradients
